buttons.primary: bg-[#F59E0B] text-white hover:bg-[#D97706] font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A2540] border-2 border-[#0A2540] hover:bg-[#F8FAFC] font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-all

cards.feature: bg-white p-8 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 hover:border-blue-100 hover:shadow-md transition-all group
cards.testimonial: bg-[#F8FAFC] p-8 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 relative

inputs.default: h-12 bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-[#0A2540] focus:ring-[#0A2540] rounded-lg

layout_strategies.hero: Split layout: Left content (Headline, Subhead, CTA), Right visual (Image/Graphic). Background: Deep Blue gradient or clean white with blue accents.
layout_strategies.grid: Bento grid for modules: Mix of 1x1 and 2x1 cards to create visual interest.
layout_strategies.section_alternation: Alternate between White and Subtle Grey (#F8FAFC) backgrounds to separate content blocks.

assets.icons: Use Lucide React icons (e.g., BookOpen, Users, Trophy, Globe, Briefcase, CheckCircle)

hero.headline: Study, Learn & Become a SAP Global Consultant!
hero.subheadline: 52 Weeks of intensive learning. 100% Placement Assistance. Internationally Recognized Certification.

benefits: Industrial Project & Case Study based teaching

testimonials.name: Saurabh Singh Jadhav
testimonials.text: AIMS offers quality education. The supportive faculty has helped me transition from a pharmacy background to decision science and accounting.

testimonials.name: Siddhi Kanitkar
testimonials.text: My AEEP journey has been exciting. The smaller student intake enhances faculty connections, making AIMS a fantastic place for growth.

testimonials.name: Aaqib Mukadam
testimonials.text: AIMS is building my practical knowledge and skills. Being a Placement Coordinator has improved my leadership skills.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Outfit' font for all headings to give a bold, modern look.
Implement the 'Enquiry Form' as a sticky element or a very prominent section near the bottom.
Use the 'Bento Grid' layout for the Course Modules section.
Ensure the 'Apply Now' button is always visible (e.g., in a sticky header).
Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections.
For the 'Recruiters' section, create a marquee of text logos if image logos are not available, or use placeholders with names like Deloitte, Accenture, IBM, etc.
Ensure mobile responsiveness is top-tier, especially for the form.
